issues.title: Add comment in OpenAiAudioSpeechModel and remove duplicated comment in OpenAiAudioSpeechOptions
issues.body:
* I found that `OpenAiAudioSpeechModel` doesn’t have enough comments for better understanding the code. 
* I found a duplicated comment in `OpenAiAudioSpeechOptions` (about `AudioResponseFormat`).

please see #932

comments.body: @devholic22 I can see that https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/932 got merged. Can this issue be closed?

issues.title: Provide Anthropic Claude streaming Function Calling support
issues.body:
Currently provide Anthropic support only non-streaming function calling. 
Extend the support for streaming similar to OpenAI, MistralAI, Gemini and Azure OpenAI.

comments.body:
Fyi @Grogdunn , @didalgolab 
as you've done some related work, you may find it interested to explore this as well.
@tzolov I'm going to look into this.

issues.title: Remove PaLM Model support as it is deprecated and will be decomissioned
issues.body:
See https://ai.google.dev/palm_docs/deprecation

The API will be decommissioned in Auguest 15th, so there is no point in keeping it in Spring AI as we will be post 1.0 GA by then.

comments.body:
PaLM2 support will end in Oct 2024, and can be removed
https://ai.google.dev/palm_docs/palm
remember to remove documentation as well.
